commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete deploy sglang-baseline --ignore-not-found 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/baseline-tp8.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/baseline-tp8.yaml 2>&1'
